content.en:
After a long time.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian completely broke the shackles and was promoted to the realm of a half-step perfect controller, whether it was the body of control or the will, he was promoted to the realm of a half-step perfect controller.

However, in the Origin Realm Sea, Ye Tian did not choose to break through.

After all, once he broke through, he would be repelled by the Origin Realm Sea.

Anyway, he can let the body break through at any time, so there is no hurry.

......

"This little guy has broken through to the realm of a half-step perfect controller!"

In a certain branch of the Daoless Tower, the Lord of Blood Separation looked at the branch tower where Ye Tian was and muttered.

He was not surprised by Ye Tian's breakthrough, after all, in his opinion, Ye Tian's combat power was comparable to that of a half-step perfect controller, and now he cultivated to a half-step perfect controller, which was not a very normal thing!

"The high-level of the Wudao Tower said that they would take care of Ye Tian, and it just so happened that he had broken through to the half-step perfect controller realm, so he could go to that place!"

The Lord of Blood Separation muttered.

Immediately, he went to find Ye Tian in person.

Soon, he came to Ye Tian's Wudao Tower, and Ye Tian personally received him.

"I've seen the Lord of Blood!"

Ye Tian bowed respectfully.

"Ye Tian, I came to you this time for a good thing. "The Lord of Blood.

"Good thing?"

Ye Tian was looking forward to it.

I saw the Lord of Blood Separation say, "Have you heard of the Blood War Capital?"

"The City of Bloodshed?"

Ye Tian shook his head, he had never heard of such a place.

Seeing that Ye Tian didn't know, the Lord of Blood Separation also felt that it was normal, after all, even in the Ruins of Eternity, only a few half-step perfect controllers knew about the Blood Battle Capital.

And Ye Tian came from other eternal places outside the Ruins of Eternity, and it had not been long since he came to the Ruins of Eternity, and he had never heard of the Capital of Bloody Wars, but it was normal.

Thereupon.

The Lord of Blood Separation introduced: "The Blood War Capital is a place dedicated to cultivating half-step perfect controllers, it is created by dozens of forces working together, and all half-step perfect controllers who have entered the Blood War Capital, as long as they do not fall, nearly one-third of the cultivators in the future have the hope of becoming perfect controllers." "

"One-third of the half-step perfect controllers have a hope of becoming perfect masters?"

Ye Tian was very surprised.

This proportion is too high, how difficult it is to become a perfect master, many forces, such as the Azure Pavilion, have so many cultivators, but there is only one perfect master.

And after entering the capital of bloody war, as long as you don't die in the future, you have a one-in-three chance of becoming the perfect controller, what a great opportunity!

It is conceivable that countless half-step perfect controllers want to enter the capital of bloody battles!

Of course, the half-step perfect controllers who are qualified to enter the Blood War Capital are all the kind of half-step perfect controllers with high talent, otherwise they are not qualified to enter.

"Lord of Blood, what is the situation in the City of Blood Battle, can you tell me?" Ye Tian asked.

"Yes!"

The Lord of Blood Separation nodded slightly, and then introduced: "The Blood War Capital is located in a special area, not the Ruins of Eternity, but a place far away from the Ruins of Eternity, where it is difficult to enter, and there are many perfect controllers sitting in the town. There, you will get a lot of training, but any training needs to rely on your own strength and opportunities, so the competition is fierce. At the same time, it is also a kind of struggle between forces. Of course, entering the capital of bloody wars, there is also the possibility of falling. Although you both have a clone of the will, once you fall, your cultivation will fall, so try not to let the clone of the will fall. The Blood War City controls a lot of special resource treasures, and only half-step perfect controllers of the Blood War City are allowed to enter. Every cultivator who enters the Blood War City can practice for 100,000 Eternal Years in the Blood War City. Although the 100,000 years are not long, the Blood War Capital is mainly a place to lay the foundation, and as long as enough benefits are obtained in the Blood War Capital, the hope of becoming a perfect controller in the future will be much greater. Here's some information about the City of Bloody War, take a look!"

The Lord of Blood Separation condensed a cloud of information light and gave it to Ye Tian.

After Ye Tian accepted it, he quickly learned a lot about the Capital of Blood War.

Subsequently, the Lord of Blood Separation left, and applied for Ye Tian to go to the Blood War Capital.

"This time entering the Blood War Capital is an opportunity, after becoming a half-step perfect controller, the resources on my body except for the flow of gold liquid, other resources have no effect, and the cultivation speed will become very slow in the future, but after entering the Blood War Capital, my growth rate will be very fast. Ye Tian said darkly.

However, it will take an incomparably long time for him to become the perfect master.

After all, he has just broken through to the half-step perfect master, this is just the beginning of the half-step perfect master, those half-step perfect controllers who are at the top even have the combat power very close to the perfect master, and they can easily kill an ordinary half-step perfect controller in an instant, far from being comparable to the ordinary half-step perfect master.

And he also knew the division between the half-step perfect masters, and here in the Eternal Ruins, the half-step perfect masters could be divided into the four realms of ordinary, top, pinnacle, and extreme.

Among them, the half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Realm is a combat power that is comparable to the real perfect master, and the strength is extremely terrifying, even in the ruins of eternity, such a half-step perfect controller is extremely rare and rare.

In the Ruins of Eternity, the most half-step perfect controllers are still ordinary half-step perfect controllers, the top half-step perfect controllers are not too many, and the number of half-step perfect controllers at the peak level is even less.

But only after becoming the pinnacle half-step perfect controller can there be hope to impact the perfect master.

As for the half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm, there are few people who pursue this realm, it is too difficult.

"When I was a Ten Realm-level Controller, I had a combat power comparable to that of an ordinary half-step Perfect Controller, and now that I have broken through to the Half-Step Perfect Controller realm, has my combat power reached the top half-step Perfect Controller's combat power?"

Ye Tian guessed.

However, he couldn't figure it out.

However, there is still a place for the Wudao Tower to test this kind of combat power, so if you test it, you can roughly judge which combat power level you are in.

"Then let's test the strength first, so that we can have a better understanding of our own strength, anyway, it will take a while to enter the Blood War Capital, so there is no need to worry. "

Subsequently.

Ye Tian entered a time and space of the Daoless Tower itself through the Daoless Tower's sub-tower, which was specially used to test combat power, and there was a combat power tower here.

Not only can the half-step perfect controller enter here, but even the perfect controller can enter here to test the combat power.
